name: Transferator AB (publ)
summary: Transferator AB (publ) is private equity firm which seeks to acquire minority stakes in promising growth companies, private as well as listed. It mainly invests in innovative Internet companies, in the Tice-sector (Technology, Information, Communication and Entertainment), the firm also invests in Fintech. The firm invests from its balance sheet. Transferator AB (publ) was founded in 2008 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
